chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Ist Civil Appeal No. D – 20 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.638/2023 (E/A) 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.639/2023 (S/A) 06.01.2026 This appeal is pending since 2023 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought till date. Diaries demonstrate that on each of the dates of hearing, the appellant has remained unrepresented. It appears that the appellant is not interested in proceeding with the matter; therefore, this appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
